form.title: Booking Page Settings
form.description: Customize the look, feel, and rules of your public-facing booking page.

appearance_section.title: Appearance & Branding
appearance_section.hero_image_upload_text: Click to upload a hero image

behavior_section.title: Booking Rules & Behavior
behavior_section.terms_placeholder: Enter your property's booking terms and conditions here. This will be shown to the guest before they confirm their booking.

promo_card_section.title: Booking Page Pop-Up
promo_card_section.enable_label: Enable promotional pop-up on booking page
promo_card_section.promotion_placeholder: Select a promotion with a coupon...
promo_card_section.manual_design_description: Recommended size: 800x1000px. This image will be shown as-is in the popup.

invoice_section.title: Invoice Customization
invoice_section.footer_text_placeholder: e.g., 'All prices are in USD. Payment is due within 30 days.'

preview_modal.title: Invoice Preview
preview_modal.description: This is a sample of how your invoice will appear with the current settings.

toasts.success_save: Booking page settings have been updated successfully.
toasts.error_property_not_found: Property not found. Could not save settings.
toasts.error_save: An unexpected error occurred while saving your settings.
